overview: Multi-agent ROI analyzer that decomposes personalization investment scenarios into specialist tasks (data lookup, calculation, research, synthesis), producing executive summaries across conservative/moderate/aggressive projections with conversion lift, revenue impact, and risk as

keyPoints.title: Supervisor pattern delegates tasks to single-tool specialists
Constraining tools per agent prevents autonomous decision drift
AI financial projections need domain expertise validation
Structure enables analysis; human judgment validates inputs/outputs
